data.title: Woodside Secures Up To 2 Mtpa LNG Offtake With Uniper Ahead of Final Louisiana FID
data.description: Woodside Energy Group signs LNG supply agreements with Uniper SE and Stonepeak, advancing their Louisiana LNG project towards final investment decision.

data.title: US Bancorp Posts Q1 Earnings Beat, New CEO Exhibits 'Sense Of Urgency'
data.description: US Bancorp reports upbeat Q1 earnings, with strong noninterest income, loan growth, and cost discipline. Analysts maintain Buy and Neutral ratings.

data.title: What's Going On With Walmart Stock Today?
data.description: Walmart stock rises as company plans to expand in India and opens major U.S. distribution center.

data.title: Temu And Shein To Raise Prices Amid US Tariffs, Slash Ad Spend On Apple, Meta
data.description: PDD Holdings Inc's online retailers Temu and Shein will raise prices to offset Trump's tariffs on Chinese imports, affecting budget shoppers.

data.title: Microsoft Analyst Lowers Rating, Flags Slower Growth, Flat Valuation Outlook
data.description: Keybanc Capital Markets analyst downgrades Microsoft due to cautious outlook for the year.
